steps.assistant_text: 21-insn MMIO read-with-range-check helper. 3-fragment merge: splat split into func_80006698 (head, 6 insns) + func_800066B0 (middle, 15 insns) + func_800066D0 (tail, merged into 800066B0 in commit 387cf2f). Step 1 (yesterday's tick): MOVE func_800066B0 INCLUDE_ASM from kernel_018.c into kernel_017.c (per feedback_cross_file_fragment_unblock_via_move_then_merge.md). Step 2 (this tick): same-file merge, replacing both INCLUDE_ASMs with a single C body at -O1. Key matching trick: write the if-else with the VALID-RANGE arm as the inline body and the return-0 arm at the end (NOT vice versa) — produces target's branch direction (bnez/beqz to invalid path) and layout. Also: u32 cast on the address comparison (a0 is signed s32 but addresses are unsigned).

metadata.verification: Verified byte-exact (0/21 word diffs) build/.o vs expected/.o; report.json fuzzy=100.
